scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n RENDERER,DESKTOP "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:desktop
scripts.build:packages: npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix packages/contracts run build && npm --prefix packages/domain run build && npm --prefix packages/media-engine run build && npm --prefix packages/persistence run build && npm --prefix packages/observability run build
